notebooks.title: 00 Getting Started Tour
notebooks.summary: Start here: run your first cells and open curated follow-ups.

notebooks.title: AI Magic
notebooks.summary: Prompt patterns for generate-and-iterate visualizations and debugging.

notebooks.title: Anomaly Detection PyOD
notebooks.summary: Time-series windows: PyOD where WASM allows, otherwise sklearn-labeled substitutes (Numba/torch slots); temperatures via %%cribl_search externaldata; interactive Plotly per model with anomaly markers (after JaminJeong/AnomalyDetectionUsingPyOD).

notebooks.title: Composio Python SDK
notebooks.summary: Explore Composio toolkits and tools via composio-client; paste your API key and run.

notebooks.title: Cribl API Examples
notebooks.summary: Use %%cribl_api for GET/POST requests and templated YAML payloads.

notebooks.title: Cribl Python SDK
notebooks.summary: SDK walkthrough for inventory insights and plotting with AI prompt helpers.

notebooks.title: Cribl Search Examples
notebooks.summary: KQL and English search patterns with templating and follow-up analysis.

notebooks.title: Cribl Search Lookup Magics
notebooks.summary: Search lookups: save/load/delete magics, $vt_lookups query, and %%cribl_api PUT/POST/DELETE REST (default_search).

notebooks.title: Incident Triage Playbook
notebooks.summary: End-to-end triage flow with search, API checks, charts, and AI prompts.

notebooks.title: Malware Hash Threat Hunt
notebooks.summary: Hosted TI + PE CSVs (notebook-app-example-data) via Search HTTP dataset; MD5 lookup join and charts. Run All from Welcome.

notebooks.title: Process Lineage Sigma Hunt
notebooks.summary: Trace Sigma-hit process lineage (WMI → PowerShell → rundll32) as a networkx kill-chain, then rank rare port/user/URL tuples with a rarity baseline. Hosted Windows telemetry via %%cribl_search externaldata (after MohitDabas/sigmalineage-mcp).

notebooks.title: Threat Hunting Playbook
notebooks.summary: Pick six external VPC flow IPs from cribl_search_sample, save a static lookup, join + timestats, and chart the timeline.

notebooks.title: Visualisations
notebooks.summary: Rendering recipes with Matplotlib, Plotly, and Vega-Lite.
